name: Research Paper AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for literature synthesis, methodology critique, research gap identification, abstract summarization, and citation context analysis

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic search over paper corpus — full-text, citation graph traversal, methodology matching, cross-discipline discovery

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Paper metadata, citation networks as graph queries, researcher profiles, review sessions, annotation history

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, Gremlin API for citation graph

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store, graph + SQL API

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Paper ingestion pipeline — PDF parsing, citation extraction, metadata enrichment, embedding generation, graph edge creation

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Research API — literature review engine, gap analysis, methodology critique, citation network explorer, collaboration hub

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, publisher API credentials, institutional authentication secrets, encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Search quality metrics, synthesis accuracy, citation graph coverage, researcher engagement, query latency

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for abstract summarization and metadata extraction, reserve GPT-4o for deep methodology critique and gap analysis — saves 60% on AI costs
Cache citation graph traversals for frequently referenced landmark papers — avoids repeated Cosmos DB graph queries for high-degree nodes
Pre-compute embeddings during paper ingestion rather than at query time — batch processing is 70% cheaper than real-time embedding generation
Use AI Search semantic cache with 15-minute TTL for popular research topics — reduces duplicate searches across concurrent researchers
Index only abstracts, introductions, and conclusions for initial search — defer full-text indexing to reduce AI Search storage costs by 60%
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
